data.title: Biggest Crypto Hack in History: Market Crashes After Bybit Faces $1.5 Billion ETH Hack
data.description:
The post Biggest Crypto Hack in History: Market Crashes After Bybit Faces $1.5 Billion ETH Hack appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
The crypto market experienced a significant downturn after Bybit, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, announced a devastating hack involving $1.5 billion worth of cryptocurrencies. This incident marks the largest crypto hack to date. Recent updates,...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/biggest-crypto-hack-in-history-market-crashes-after-bybit-faces-1-5-billion-eth-hack/

data.title: Bybit CEO: Even if the loss is irreversible, Bybit is able to pay in full
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou posted on the X platform: Bybit is solvent. Even if the losses from the hacker attack are irreversible, all customer assets are backed 1:1 and we can make up for the losses.

data.title: Significant Liquidation Occurs Following sUSDe Price Drop
data.description: According to Foresight News, PeckShield monitoring has revealed that after the price of sUSDe fell to $1.14, an address beginning with 0x438 experienced a liquidation of 11.79 million sUSDe.

data.title: Cosine: Bybit hackers’ attack methods are similar to those of North Korean hackers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Slow Mist Yuxian posted on the X platform: "Although there is no clear evidence now, judging from the Safe multi-signature method and the current coin laundering method, it looks like North Korean hackers."

data.title: Zhu Su: I waited for 2.5 years to receive compensation from FTX, and then deposited it in Bybit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Zhu Su posted on the X platform that he waited for 2.5 years and finally received the compensation from FTX, and then deposited it in Bybit.

data.title: ZachXBT: Bybit attacker distributed 10,000 ETH to 39 EVM addresses, and recommended relevant personnel to handle it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News ZachXBT once again published a statement saying that the Bybit attacker distributed 10,000 ETH to 39 addresses. Once again reminding the relevant personnel of exchanges and service providers, it is recommended to blacklist and ban the relevant addresses.

data.title: Arkham: Bybit outflow funds have sold $200 million of stETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, Bybit outflow exceeded $1 billion. $1.4 billion of ETH and stETH flowed out of Bybit, and the funds have begun to be transferred to new addresses for sale. So far, $200 million of stETH has been sold.
Address: 0x47666Fab8bd0Ac7003bce3f5C3585383F09486E2

data.title: MNT Experiences Volatility With Recent Price Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 21, market data indicated that MNT briefly fell below $0.90 before recovering to $0.9572. The cryptocurrency experienced a 24-hour decline of 7.71%.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 0.03% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 21, 2025, 15:44 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.650024 USDT, with a narrowed 0.03% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a 1.84% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 21, 2025, 15:44 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,681.060059 USDT, with a narrowed 1.84% decrease in 24 hours.
